header_0.cue: A coworker takes credit for your idea
header_0.raw_response: In this situation, I would place the marker at 60. I would first approach the coworker privately to discuss the situation, expressing my feelings and asking for their acknowledgment. However, if the behavior continues or escalates, I would not hesitate to involve a manager or HR to ensure my ideas are properly credited.
